title: A Pit in Spain Holds the Key to a Neanderthal DNA Mystery - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews David Reich about Neanderthal DNA discovery from an archaeological site in Spain. The discussion covers paleogenomic research methods and findings related to ancient human ancestry.
